节点认购点击请求接口:api/v1/subscription/getOrder
返回参数:
{
    "code": 200,
    "local": "TW",
    "message": "",
    "data": {
        "order_no": "SUB20260430001821LLAHTNME",
        "recharge_contract": "0x5dbc6048b3fa0646d6af061fdba6d0c55c437fb8",
        "usdt_contract": "0x22f38c8a7898f2a0d00514eedac132777fcf5b1b",
        "amount_wei": "500000000000000000000",
        "amount_display": "500 USDT",
        "tx_data": ""
    }
}
前端通过返回的参数去链上发起支付

现在的待支付订单页面:
商城支付订单 请求接口:api/v1/preOrder/getPreOrderPayment?pre_order_id=16&pre_order_payment_id=511
返回支付信息 选择链->点击确认请求接口:/api/v1/preOrder/pay
参考节点认购怎么使用服务端返回的数据来拉起链上支付的 服务端告知我 使用下面接口返回的data.web3.recharge_contract/data.web3.tx_data 看看是否通过这2个参数就能实现和节点认购一样拉起钱包进行支付了 是否还需要其他字段 需要我去问服务端要 我们不猜测
返回参数:{
    "code": 200,
    "local": "TW",
    "message": "",
    "data": {
        "order_no": "62202604300022062063",
        "currency": {
            "name": "USDT",
            "contract_address": "0x22f38c8a7898f2a0d00514eedac132777fcf5b1b",
            "decimals": 18,
            "chain_id": 9777
        },
        "amount": "8149.000000",
        "recharge_contract": "0x5dbc6048b3fa0646d6af061fdba6d0c55c437fb8",
        "tx_data": "",
        "web3": {
            "method": "buy_gold",
            "recharge_contract": "0x5dbc6048b3fa0646d6af061fdba6d0c55c437fb8",
            "tx_data": "",
            "amount_wei": "8149000000000000000000",
            "gold_amount_wei": "5867280000000000000000",
            "direct_recipients": [
                "0x6911a87857152Ff672E42BC349a9A226348475C1"
            ],
            "direct_amounts_wei": [
                "319440800000000000000"
            ],
            "lp_amount_wei": "1962279200000000000000"
        },
        "distribution": {
            "physical_rate": "0.72",
            "physical_amount": "5867.280000",
            "destroy_total_rate": "0.28",
            "destroy_total_amount": "2281.720000",
            "destroy_profit_rate": "0.14",
            "destroy_profit_amount": "319.440800",
            "destroy_rate": "0.86",
            "destroy_amount": "1962.279200",
            "direct_recipients": [
                "0x6911a87857152Ff672E42BC349a9A226348475C1"
            ],
            "direct_amounts": [
                "319.440800"
            ]
        }
    }
}

销毁挖矿也是请求接口:api/v1/preOrder/pay
都是有返回data.web3
返回数据:{
    "code": 200,
    "local": "TW",
    "message": "",
    "data": {
        "order_no": "62202604300024096902",
        "currency": {
            "name": "AUS",
            "contract_address": "0x06ea065c503eddadd33f558c105bff3b6045b623",
            "decimals": 18,
            "chain_id": 9777
        },
        "amount": "22.000000",
        "recharge_contract": "0x5dbc6048b3fa0646d6af061fdba6d0c55c437fb8",
        "tx_data": "",
        "web3": {
            "method": "burn_deposit",
            "recharge_contract": "0x5dbc6048b3fa0646d6af061fdba6d0c55c437fb8",
            "tx_data": "",
            "amount_wei": "22000000000000000000"
        }
    }
}
